'''sazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:oncet|oncet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oncet|oncet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sazhate|sazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sazhatesher|sazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sazhatesherĂ«m|sazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sazhatero|sazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sazhateshĂ«|sazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sazhateshĂ«m|sazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisazhatero|gokisazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisazhateshĂ«|gokisazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisazhateshĂ«m|gokisazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosazhankerom|gosazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosazhankeshĂ«|gosazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosazhankeshĂ«m|gosazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosazhankeya|gosazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sazhaterom|sazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sazhatemu|sazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sazhateya|sazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisazhaterom|gokisazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisazhatemu|gokisazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisazhateya|gokisazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sazhazhate|sazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sazhazhatesher|sazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sazhazhatesherĂ«m|sazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sazhazhatero|sazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sazhazhateshĂ«|sazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sazhazhateshĂ«m|sazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisazhazhatero|gokisazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisazhazhateshĂ«|gokisazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisazhazhateshĂ«m|gokisazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosazhazhankerom|gosazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosazhazhankeshĂ«|gosazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosazhazhankeshĂ«m|gosazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosazhazhankeya|gosazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sazhazhaterom|sazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sazhazhatemu|sazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sazhazhateya|sazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisazhazhaterom|gokisazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisazhazhatemu|gokisazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisazhazhateya|gokisazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠzhĂŠte|sĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠzhĂŠtesher|sĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠzhĂŠtero|sĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokisĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠzhĂŠterom|sĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠzhĂŠtemu|sĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠzhĂŠteya|sĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokisĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokisĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safzhafte|safzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safzhaftesher|safzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safzhaftesherĂ«m|safzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safzhaftero|safzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safzhafteshĂ«|safzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safzhafteshĂ«m|safzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafzhaftero|gokisafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafzhafteshĂ«|gokisafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafzhafteshĂ«m|gokisafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafzhafnkerom|gosafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafzhafnkeshĂ«|gosafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gosafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafzhafnkeya|gosafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safzhafterom|safzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safzhaftemu|safzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safzhafteya|safzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafzhafterom|gokisafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafzhaftemu|gokisafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafzhafteya|gokisafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
